scada.topo.components.propertyBar.variat: Different components are different, refer to the data below to modify
Random values: Value1, Value2, Value3......, separated by commas, for example: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6; 'Processed', 'Unprocessed', 'Processing'
Range values: Minimum value - Maximum value, for example: 0 - 100
Decimal places setting: For example, 10 - 30.1 indicates a random value between 10 and 30 with one decimal place, such as: 13.5
scada.topo.components.propertyBar.calcVa: Supports the combined use of 'attribute variables', operation symbols, or numbers. The operation variable data is displayed after being calculated by the operation formula.

Operation instructions: After clicking "Insert Variable", the number before the variable will be automatically filled in the "Calculation Formula" input box. For example, if the attribute variable is "Voltage", "A" will be filled in the calculation formula. You can also manually enter the capital letter A. The usage rules of operation symbols are as follows:
Add: A+B+10, Subtract: A-B-10, Multiply: A*B*10, Divide: A/B/10, Remainder: A%10, Parentheses: (A+B)*10
Note: Please enter at least one variable number. It is also supported to enter only a single variable number.
scada.topo.components.propertyBar.clickE: Please enter the link, such as: https://www.xxxxxx.com
scada.topo.components.unitLibBar.index.8: PC end and mobile end configuration interface description:
One configuration can edit PC end and mobile end two interfaces, using different page sizes.
Clicking on the tabs on the left allows you to switch between the configuration editing interfaces for the PC and mobile ends.
Clicking the checkbox enables or disables the corresponding configuration interface.

During configuration runtime, depending on the running device, the configuration interface of the PC or mobile end will be run. If the corresponding configuration interface is disabled, the configuration interface of the other end will be run. (Example: If the configuration interface of the mobile end is disabled, but the configuration is viewed on a mobile phone, the configuration interface of the PC end will be displayed)

After checking, a separate configuration interface for the PC end will be enabled, requiring a separate design for the PC end configuration interface, which will not be shared with the mobile end.

If not checked, the configuration interface of the mobile end will be displayed on the PC.

Are you sure you want to enable the configuration interface of the PC end?
The configuration interface for both the PC and mobile ends cannot be disabled simultaneously
The configuration interface for the PC end has been disabled

After checking, an independent configuration interface for the mobile end will be enabled, requiring a separate design for the mobile end configuration interface, which will not be shared with the PC end.

If not checked, the configuration interface for the PC end will be displayed on mobile devices.

Are you sure you want to enable the configuration interface for the mobile end?
The mobile configuration interface has been disabled
